description: Ketubba draft from Cairo dated 22 November 1822 (8 Kislev 5583), for Khalīfa b. [name omitted] Kika(?) (כיכא) and the widow Sulṭāna bt. Nissim Qajiji. This document was likely a late-stage draft given that the groom's father's name was never written. The grand sum of the ketubba is 32000 medins (מך). All signatures are lost to damage, but it's likely that the scribe signed on behalf of the groom based on the fragment of text visible in the middle of the signatures section.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בAramaic, Hebrew. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
